sentiment.label: Cautious
sentiment.detail: EU prohibited-practices enforcement active, US state bills advancing

sentiment.label: Mixed
sentiment.detail: EU enforcement balanced by US federal deregulation signals

sentiment.label: Balanced
sentiment.detail: Global divergence: EU tightening, US deregulating, Asia stabilizing

risks.factors: AI Act prohibited practices in effect, high-risk obligations Aug 2026, penalties up to 7% turnover
Generative AI regulations, algorithm registration, content alignment requirements
ICO guidance, sector-specific rules via existing regulators, pro-innovation approach
State patchwork (CO, NY, MA), federal deregulation under EO 14179, FTC enforcement

events.title: EU AI Act Prohibited Practices Now Enforceable
events.summary: Article 5 provisions banning social scoring, untargeted facial recognition scraping, and emotion inference in workplaces/schools have been enforceable since Feb 2, 2025.

events.title: Colorado SB 24-205 Implementation Approaches
events.summary: First comprehensive state AI bias law (signed May 2024) nears its June 30, 2026 implementation deadline after delay by SB 25B-004.

events.title: Trump Administration Signals State Preemption
events.summary: December 2025 executive order created DOJ AI Litigation Task Force to challenge state AI laws in federal court.

events.title: New York RAISE Act Introduced
events.summary: NY Senate Bill S2632 proposes regulating frontier AI models, joining multiple AI employment bills in the state legislature.

events.title: Massachusetts AI Disclosure Act
events.summary: H.81 and related bills advancing in the legislature, addressing AI transparency in healthcare and consumer targeting.

deadlines.title: Colorado SB 24-205 Implementation
deadlines.description: Consumer Protections for AI Act takes effect (delayed from Feb 2026 by SB 25B-004)

deadlines.title: EU AI Act High-Risk Obligations
deadlines.description: Full compliance required for high-risk AI systems under Annex III

deadlines.title: EU AI Act General-Purpose AI Obligations
deadlines.description: Obligations for general-purpose AI models took effect Aug 2, 2025

deadlines.title: EU AI Act Full Application
deadlines.description: Remaining AI Act provisions apply, including high-risk systems in Annex I
